<timestamp>Monday, Jul 6, 2026, 11:34 PM (UTC+3:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Create WPF UI files in D:\napsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\:

1. ViewModels/MainViewModel.cs - MVVM with CommunityToolkit.Mvvm:
   - Import file (.npvt, npv4), Import URI
   - Connect/Disconnect with mode SystemProxy/TUN
   - For TUN: check ElevationHelper.IsRunningAsAdmin(), if not prompt to restart elevated
   - Ensure binaries via BinaryManager before connect
   - For .npvt import ensure npvt-decoder downloaded
   - Log redaction via LogRedactor
   - System tray minimize support hook
   - Legal disclaimer on first run (Constants.DisclaimerFlagFile)

2. Views/MainWindow.xaml + MainWindow.xaml.cs - dark theme UI: profile list, mode combo, connect/disconnect, import buttons, log panel

3. Views/PasswordDialog.xaml + .cs - password input for locked configs

4. Views/InputDialog.xaml + .cs - multi-line URI input

5. App.xaml - dark theme resources, Startup to MainWindow (NOT StartupUri in xaml if using code startup)

6. App.xaml.cs - logging setup, MainViewModel init, cleanup on exit, SessionEnding handler

Delete or replace default MainWindow.xaml in project root if exists - use Views/ folder.

Use namespace NapsternetVClient.Views and NapsternetVClient.ViewModels.

Return list of files created.
</user_query>

Exploring the project structure and existing services so the WPF UI matches current patterns.

[REDACTED]

arguments.query: BinaryManager connection service profile storage NapsternetVClient

input.query: Where is BinaryManager defined for downloading xray sing-box binaries?

input.contents:
<Window x:Class="NapsternetVClient.Views.PasswordDialog"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="Password Required"
        Height="220"
        Width="420"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Background="{StaticResource WindowBackgroundBrush}">
    <Grid Margin="16">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <TextBlock x:Name="MessageText"
                   Grid.Row="0"
                   TextWrapping="Wrap"
                   Margin="0,0,0,12"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>

        <PasswordBox x:Name="PasswordBox"
                     Grid.Row="1"
                     Margin="0,0,0,16"
                     Padding="8,6"
                     KeyDown="PasswordBox_KeyDown"/>

        <StackPanel Grid.Row="3"
                    Orientation="Horizontal"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Right">
            <Button Content="OK"
                    Width="90"
                    Margin="0,0,8,0"
                    IsDefault="True"
                    Click="Ok_Click"/>
            <Button Content="Cancel"
                    Width="90"
                    IsCancel="True"
                    Click="Cancel_Click"/>
        </StackPanel>
    </Grid>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="NapsternetVClient.Views.InputDialog"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="Input"
        Height="320"
        Width="520"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        ResizeMode="CanResizeWithGrip"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        MinHeight="240"
        MinWidth="400"
        Background="{StaticResource WindowBackgroundBrush}">
    <Grid Margin="16">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <TextBlock x:Name="PromptText"
                   Grid.Row="0"
                   TextWrapping="Wrap"
                   Margin="0,0,0,12"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>

        <TextBox x:Name="InputTextBox"
                 Grid.Row="1"
                 AcceptsReturn="True"
                 TextWrapping="Wrap"
                 VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                 HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                 FontFamily="Consolas"
                 Padding="8"
                 Margin="0,0,0,16"/>

        <StackPanel Grid.Row="2"
                    Orientation="Horizontal"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Right">
            <Button Content="OK"
                    Width="90"
                    Margin="0,0,8,0"
                    IsDefault="True"
                    Click="Ok_Click"/>
            <Button Content="Cancel"
                    Width="90"
                    IsCancel="True"
                    Click="Cancel_Click"/>
        </StackPanel>
    </Grid>
</Window>

<Application x:Class="NapsternetVClient.App"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml">
    <Application.Resources>
        <Color x:Key="WindowBackgroundColor">#FF1E1E1E</Color>
        <Color x:Key="PanelBackgroundColor">#FF252526</Color>
        <Color x:Key="BorderColor">#FF3E3E42</Color>
        <Color x:Key="ForegroundColor">#FFE0E0E0</Color>
        <Color x:Key="MutedForegroundColor">#FFAAAAAA</Color>
        <Color x:Key="AccentColor">#FF007ACC</Color>
        <Color x:Key="AccentHoverColor">#FF1C97EA</Color>
        <Color x:Key="DangerColor">#FFC75050</Color>

        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="WindowBackgroundBrush" Color="{StaticResource WindowBackgroundColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="PanelBackgroundBrush" Color="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="BorderBrush" Color="{StaticResource BorderColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="ForegroundBrush" Color="{StaticResource ForegroundColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="MutedForegroundBrush" Color="{StaticResource MutedForegroundColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="AccentBrush" Color="{StaticResource AccentColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="AccentHoverBrush" Color="{StaticResource AccentHoverColor}"/>
        <SolidColorBrush x:Key="DangerBrush" Color="{StaticResource DangerColor}"/>

        <Style TargetType="Window">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource WindowBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontFamily" Value="Segoe UI"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                CornerRadius="3"
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.5"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="AccentButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type Button}}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource AccentHoverBrush}"/>
                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource AccentHoverBrush}"/>
                </Trigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <Style x:Key="DangerButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type Button}}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource DangerBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource DangerBrush}"/>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="TextBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="CaretBrush" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="PasswordBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="CaretBrush" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="ComboBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="ListBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource ForegroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="ListBoxItem">
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,6"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                </Trigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <Style TargetType="StatusBar">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource MutedForegroundBrush}"/>
        </Style>
    </Application.Resources>
</Application>

<Window x:Class="NapsternetVClient.Views.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:tb="http://www.hardcodet.net/taskbar"
        Title="NapsternetV Client"
        Height="640"
        Width="900"
        MinHeight="480"
        MinWidth="720"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        StateChanged="Window_StateChanged"
        Closing="Window_Closing">
    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="220"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Toolbar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0"
                Background="{StaticResource PanelBackgroundBrush}"
                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                BorderThickness="0,0,0,1"
                Padding="12,10">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <Button Content="Import File"
                            Margin="0,0,8,0"
                            Command="{Binding ImportFileCommand}"/>
                    <Button Content="Import URI"
                            Margin="0,0,8,0"
                            Command="{Binding ImportUriCommand}"/>
                    <Button Content="Remove"
                            Command="{Binding RemoveProfileCommand}"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <StackPanel Grid.Column="2"
                            Orientation="Horizontal"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Right">
                    <TextBlock Text="Mode:"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center"
                               Margin="0,0,8,0"
                               Foreground="{StaticResource MutedForegroundBrush}"/>
                    <ComboBox Width="140"
                              ItemsSource="{Binding ConnectionModes}"
                              SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedMode}"
                              Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                    <Button Content="Connect"
                            Style="{StaticResource AccentButton}"
                            Margin="0,0,8,0"
                            Command="{Binding ConnectCommand}"/>
                    <Button Content="Disconnect"
                            Style="{StaticResource DangerButton}"
                            Command="{Binding DisconnectCommand}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Profile list -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="12,12,12,6">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0"
                       Text="Profiles"
                       FontWeight="SemiBold"
                       Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

            <ListBox Grid.Row="1"
                     ItemsSource="{Binding Profiles}"
                     SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedProfile}"
                     DisplayMemberPath="."
                     BorderThickness="1"/>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Log panel -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="12,6,12,12">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <DockPanel Grid.Row="0" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                <Button DockPanel.Dock="Right"
                        Content="Clear Log"
                        Padding="8,4"
                        Command="{Binding ClearLogCommand}"/>
                <TextBlock Text="Log"
                           FontWeight="SemiBold"
                           VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </DockPanel>

            <ListBox x:Name="LogListBox"
                     Grid.Row="1"
                     ItemsSource="{Binding LogLines}"
                     FontFamily="Consolas"
                     FontSize="12"
                     BorderThickness="1"/>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Status bar -->
        <StatusBar Grid.Row="3">
            <StatusBarItem>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding StatusMessage}"/>
            </StatusBarItem>
            <Separator/>
            <StatusBarItem>
                <TextBlock>
                    <Run Text="State: "/>
                    <Run Text="{Binding ConnectionState}"/>
                </TextBlock>
            </StatusBarItem>
            <StatusBarItem HorizontalAlignment="Right">
                <TextBlock Foreground="{StaticResource MutedForegroundBrush}"
                           Text="Minimize hides to system tray"/>
            </StatusBarItem>
        </StatusBar>

        <tb:TaskbarIcon x:Name="TrayIcon"
                        ToolTipText="NapsternetV Client"
                        Visibility="Collapsed"
                        TrayMouseDoubleClick="TrayIcon_TrayMouseDoubleClick">
            <tb:TaskbarIcon.ContextMenu>
                <ContextMenu>
                    <MenuItem Header="Show" Click="TrayShow_Click"/>
                    <Separator/>
                    <MenuItem Header="Exit" Click="TrayExit_Click"/>
                </ContextMenu>
            </tb:TaskbarIcon.ContextMenu>
        </tb:TaskbarIcon>
    </Grid>
</Window>

input.command:
dotnet build "D:
apsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\NapsternetVClient.csproj" --no-restore 2>&1; if (-not $?) { dotnet restore "D:
apsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\NapsternetVClient.csproj"; dotnet build "D:
apsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\NapsternetVClient.csproj" 2>&1 }

input.final_summary: Created all requested WPF UI files under `Views/` and `ViewModels/`, replaced root `MainWindow`, and wired `App.xaml.cs` for logging, startup, tray minimize, disclaimer, and cleanup. Build is currently blocked by pre-existing Core/Network issues from the parallel service layer (unsafe blocks, missing `HttpClient` import), not by the new UI code.

content.text:
All requested WPF UI files are in place. Summary:

## Files created

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `ViewModels/MainViewModel.cs` | MVVM with CommunityToolkit.Mvvm |
| `Views/MainWindow.xaml` | Dark-theme main UI |
| `Views/MainWindow.xaml.cs` | Tray minimize, log auto-scroll |
| `Views/PasswordDialog.xaml` | Password prompt UI |
| `Views/PasswordDialog.xaml.cs` | Static `Prompt()` helper |
| `Views/InputDialog.xaml` | Multi-line URI input UI |
| `Views/InputDialog.xaml.cs` | Static `Prompt()` helper |

## Files updated

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `App.xaml` | Dark theme resources; removed `StartupUri` |
| `App.xaml.cs` | Logging, service wiring, code startup, `SessionEnding`/exit cleanup |

## Files removed

| File | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `MainWindow.xaml` (project root) | Replaced by `Views/MainWindow.xaml` |
| `MainWindow.xaml.cs` (project root) | Replaced by `Views/MainWindow.xaml.cs` |

## MainViewModel features

- **Import file** (`.npvt`, `.npv4`, etc.) and **Import URI** via dialogs
- **Connect/Disconnect** with `SystemProxy` / `Tun` mode
- **TUN elevation check** via `ElevationHelper.IsRunningAsAdmin()` with restart prompt
- **Binary ensure** via `BinaryManager.EnsureAllAsync()` before connect; `EnsureNpvtDecoderAsync()` for `.npvt` import
- **Log redaction** via `LogRedactor.Redact()`
- **Tray minimize hook** via `RequestMinimizeToTray` / `MinimizeToTrayOnClose`
- **First-run disclaimer** using `Constants.DisclaimerFlagFile`

Build is still blocked by Core/Network issues from the parallel service layer (`AllowUnsafeBlocks`, missing `HttpClient` import in `BinaryManager.cs`), not by the new UI code.

[REDACTED]
